requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity — TR EAEU 037/2016 Radio Equipment (EAEU Single Market)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格标志——TR EAEU 037/2016无线电设备（EAEU单一市场）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格標誌——TR EAEU 037/2016無線電設備（EAEU單一市場）

summary.en: Radio equipment placed on the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) market — which includes Kazakhstan, Russia, Belarus, Armenia, and Kyrgyzstan — must comply with Technical Regulation of the EAEU TR EAEU 037/2016 'On the safety of radio equipment' and carry the EAC (Eurasian Conformity — Евразийское соответствие) mark. TR EAEU 037/2016 covers radio transmitters and receivers, Wi-Fi access points, Bluetooth devices, IoT modules, and wireless sensor devices. Conformity assessment may be carried out via type examination by a notified body (certification) or manufacturer's declaration of conformity for lower-risk categories. Test reports must be issued by accredited EAEU laboratories. The EAC mark followed by the CU/EAC symbol must appear on the product and packaging. EAC certificates are issued by accredited certification bodies recognised by the Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC). The EAC certificate or declaration of conformity must name a legal entity registered in an EAEU member state as the declarant or certificate holder.
summary.zh: 投放欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）市场的无线电设备——涵盖哈萨克斯坦、俄罗斯、白俄罗斯、亚美尼亚及吉尔吉斯斯坦——须符合EAEU技术法规TR EAEU 037/2016《无线电设备安全》，并贴附EAC（欧亚合格——Евразийское соответствие）标志。TR EAEU 037/2016适用于无线电收发器、Wi-Fi接入点、蓝牙设备、物联网模块及无线传感器设备。合格评定可通过指定机构的型式检验（认证）或针对低风险类别的制造商合格声明进行。测试报告须由经认可的EAEU实验室出具。EAC标志须印于产品及包装上。EAC证书由欧亚经济委员会（EEC）承认的认可认证机构颁发。EAC证书或合格声明须将在EAEU成员国注册的法律实体列为声明人或证书持有人。
summary.zht: 投放歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）市場的無線電設備——涵蓋哈薩克斯坦、俄羅斯、白俄羅斯、亞美尼亞及吉爾吉斯斯坦——須符合EAEU技術法規TR EAEU 037/2016《無線電設備安全》，並貼附EAC（歐亞合格——Евразийское соответствие）標誌。TR EAEU 037/2016適用於無線電收發器、Wi-Fi接入點、藍牙設備、物聯網模組及無線傳感器設備。合格評定可通過指定機構的型式檢驗（認證）或針對低風險類別的製造商合格聲明進行。測試報告須由經認可的EAEU實驗室出具。EAC標誌須印於產品及包裝上。EAC證書由歐亞經濟委員會（EEC）承認的認可認證機構頒發。EAC證書或合格聲明須將在EAEU成員國註冊的法律實體列為聲明人或證書持有人。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 037/2016 — Technical Regulation of the Eurasian Economic Union 'On the safety of radio equipment' (Decision of the EEC Council No. 38, 22 June 2016)
EAC (Eurasian Conformity) marking requirements — Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC)
Decision of the EEC Council No. 41 (2013) — Unified list of products subject to mandatory conformity assessment in the EAEU

summary.en: China does not participate in the EAEU and does not have a direct national equivalent to TR EAEU 037/2016. The closest Chinese parallel for radio equipment is SRRC type approval (for radio transmission equipment under MIIT), which covers spectrum conformity but uses Chinese technical standards (e.g., GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi, YBT series for Bluetooth). CCC certification covers electrical safety and some EMC aspects. CE marking (EU) is sometimes confused with EAC marking but they are entirely separate regimes. Neither CCC, SRRC, nor CE substitutes for EAC marking under TR EAEU 037/2016.
summary.zh: 中国不参与EAEU，国内也无TR EAEU 037/2016的直接对应要求。最接近的类比为针对无线电发射设备的SRRC型号核准（工业和信息化部下属），涵盖频谱符合性，但采用中国技术标准（如Wi-Fi适用GB 15629.11，蓝牙适用YBT系列）。CCC认证涵盖电气安全和部分电磁兼容方面。CE标志（欧盟）有时与EAC标志混淆，但二者属于完全独立的制度。CCC、SRRC及CE均不可替代TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC标志。
summary.zht: 中國不參與EAEU，國內也無TR EAEU 037/2016的直接對應要求。最接近的類比為針對無線電發射設備的SRRC型號核准（工業和信息化部下屬），涵蓋頻譜符合性，但採用中國技術標準（如Wi-Fi適用GB 15629.11，藍牙適用YBT系列）。CCC認證涵蓋電氣安全和部分電磁相容方面。CE標誌（歐盟）有時與EAC標誌混淆，但兩者屬於完全獨立的制度。CCC、SRRC及CE均不可替代TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC標誌。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — LAN/MAN (Wi-Fi / WLAN standard, China)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, covers electrical safety and partial EMC for in-scope products

gap.en: TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC conformity marking is mandatory for all radio equipment sold in any EAEU member state, including Kazakhstan. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and CE documentation do not satisfy EAEU requirements. The manufacturer or EAEU-registered legal entity must obtain an EAC certificate from an accredited EAEU certification body, supported by test reports from EAEU-accredited laboratories. The EAC certificate must be registered in the Unified Register of Certificates of Conformity of the EAEU. Additionally, in Kazakhstan, this EAC marking requirement runs in parallel with (and does not replace) the OTAU national type approval requirement. Products must satisfy both before being placed on the Kazakhstan market.
gap.zh: TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格标志对在任何EAEU成员国（包括哈萨克斯坦）销售的无线电设备均为强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC及CE文件不满足EAEU要求。制造商或EAEU注册法律实体须从经认可的EAEU认证机构取得EAC证书，并附上EAEU认可实验室出具的测试报告。EAC证书须登记在EAEU合格证书统一注册册中。此外，在哈萨克斯坦，此EAC标志要求与（而非替代）OTAU国家型号核准要求并行实施。产品须同时满足两项要求方可投放哈萨克斯坦市场。
gap.zht: TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格標誌對在任何EAEU成員國（包括哈薩克斯坦）銷售的無線電設備均為強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC及CE文件不滿足EAEU要求。製造商或EAEU註冊法律實體須從經認可的EAEU認證機構取得EAC證書，並附上EAEU認可實驗室出具的測試報告。EAC證書須登記在EAEU合格證書統一註冊冊中。此外，在哈薩克斯坦，此EAC標誌要求與（而非替代）OTAU國家型號核准要求並行實施。產品須同時滿足兩項要求方可投放哈薩克斯坦市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 required for all radio equipment placed on the EAEU market (including Kazakhstan)
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China is not an EAEU member; closest equivalent is SRRC type approval (mandatory for radio transmission equipment in China)

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Decision of the EEC Council No. 38

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC conformity marking is mandatory for all radio and wireless devices sold in Kazakhstan and other EAEU member states. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and CE documentation do not satisfy this requirement. An EAC certificate from an accredited EAEU certification body, with EAEU-lab test reports, is required. Note that in Kazakhstan this EAC requirement is additional to OTAU type approval — both must be satisfied.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格标志对所有在哈萨克斯坦及其他EAEU成员国销售的无线电及无线设备为强制要求。中国SRRC、CCC及CE文件均不满足此要求。须从经认可的EAEU认证机构取得附有EAEU实验室测试报告的EAC证书。注意，在哈萨克斯坦，此EAC要求是对OTAU型号核准的补充——两者均须满足。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR EAEU 037/2016 EAC合格標誌對所有在哈薩克斯坦及其他EAEU成員國銷售的無線電及無線設備為強制要求。中國SRRC、CCC及CE文件均不滿足此要求。須從經認可的EAEU認證機構取得附有EAEU實驗室測試報告的EAC證書。注意，在哈薩克斯坦，此EAC要求是對OTAU型號核准的補充——兩者均須滿足。

requirement_topic.en: EAC Conformity — TR CU 020/2011 Electromagnetic Compatibility (EAEU Single Market)
requirement_topic.zh: EAC合格标志——TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容（EAEU单一市场）
requirement_topic.zht: EAC合格標誌——TR CU 020/2011電磁相容（EAEU單一市場）

summary.en: Electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EAEU market must comply with Technical Regulation of the Customs Union TR CU 020/2011 'Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices', which sets mandatory EMC requirements including emission limits and immunity levels. Compliance is required for virtually all electronic equipment that generates or is susceptible to electromagnetic interference, covering both intentional and unintentional radiators. Conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011 for wireless and IoT devices typically follows the certification route (type examination by an accredited body), though a declaration of conformity route exists for some equipment categories. EAC marking for TR CU 020/2011 must appear on the product alongside any other applicable EAC marks (e.g., TR EAEU 037/2016 for radio, and electrical safety TRs). Test reports must be from EAEU-accredited EMC testing laboratories.
summary.zh: 投放EAEU市场的电气和电子设备须符合海关联盟技术法规TR CU 020/2011《技术设备电磁兼容性》，该法规规定了包括发射限值和抗扰度级别在内的强制性电磁兼容要求。几乎所有产生或受电磁干扰影响的电子设备均须达标，涵盖有意和无意辐射体。针对无线及物联网设备，TR CU 020/2011下的合格评定通常采用认证路径（经认可机构的型式检验），但部分设备类别也可采用合格声明路径。TR CU 020/2011的EAC标志须与其他适用EAC标志（如无线电设备的TR EAEU 037/2016及电气安全技术法规的EAC标志）一同出现在产品上。测试报告须来自EAEU认可的电磁兼容测试实验室。
summary.zht: 投放EAEU市場的電氣和電子設備須符合海關聯盟技術法規TR CU 020/2011《技術設備電磁相容性》，該法規規定了包括發射限值和抗擾度級別在內的強制性電磁相容要求。幾乎所有產生或受電磁干擾影響的電子設備均須達標，涵蓋有意和無意輻射體。針對無線及物聯網設備，TR CU 020/2011下的合格評定通常採用認證路徑（經認可機構的型式檢驗），但部分設備類別也可採用合格聲明路徑。TR CU 020/2011的EAC標誌須與其他適用EAC標誌（如無線電設備的TR EAEU 037/2016及電氣安全技術法規的EAC標誌）一同出現在產品上。測試報告須來自EAEU認可的電磁相容測試實驗室。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union 'Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices' (Decision of the CU Commission No. 879, 9 December 2011)
GOST 32137-2013 — Electromagnetic compatibility; GOST series aligned with IEC CISPR publications for emission and immunity test methods applicable under TR CU 020/2011

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC regime for electronic and electrical equipment is enforced through the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme using standards GB/T 9254 (for Information Technology Equipment — ITE emission, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2). For wireless devices, EMC is also partly covered under SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL testing. Chinese EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 is conducted by CNCA-designated testing laboratories and does not substitute for EAEU EMC conformity testing under TR CU 020/2011, which uses GOST standards aligned with CISPR and IEC 61000 series.
summary.zh: 中国针对电气和电子设备的强制性电磁兼容制度通过CCC（中国强制认证）体系执行，采用标准GB/T 9254（信息技术设备辐射，与CISPR 22/32接轨）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，与IEC 61000-3-2接轨）。对于无线设备，电磁兼容性也部分涵盖于SRRC型号核准和工业和信息化部NAL测试中。依据GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1进行的中国电磁兼容认证由CNCA指定测试实验室开展，不可替代TR CU 020/2011下采用与CISPR及IEC 61000系列接轨的GOST标准进行的EAEU电磁兼容合格测试。
summary.zht: 中國針對電氣和電子設備的強制性電磁相容制度通過CCC（中國強制認證）體系執行，採用標準GB/T 9254（信息技術設備輻射，與CISPR 22/32接軌）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，與IEC 61000-3-2接軌）。對於無線設備，電磁相容性也部分涵蓋於SRRC型號核准和工業和信息化部NAL測試中。依據GB/T 9254和GB 17625.1進行的中國電磁相容認證由CNCA指定測試實驗室開展，不可替代TR CU 020/2011下採用與CISPR及IEC 61000系列接軌的GOST標準進行的EAEU電磁相容合格測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (CCC, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (CCC, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA, mandatory EMC certification for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

gap.en: Chinese CCC EMC certification (GB/T 9254, GB 17625.1) does not satisfy EAEU TR CU 020/2011 requirements. TR CU 020/2011 uses GOST standards aligned with the CISPR and IEC 61000 series, but the conformity assessment must be conducted under the EAEU framework by an EAEU-accredited laboratory and certified by an accredited EAEU certification body. While the underlying technical requirements may be broadly similar (both draw on CISPR and IEC 61000 methods), the test reports and conformity documentation must originate from EAEU-accredited entities to be valid for EAC marking. Products must carry a combined EAC marking covering both TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) and TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio) before market entry in Kazakhstan.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电磁兼容认证（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）不满足EAEU TR CU 020/2011要求。TR CU 020/2011采用与CISPR及IEC 61000系列接轨的GOST标准，但合格评定须在EAEU框架内由EAEU认可实验室开展，并由经认可的EAEU认证机构颁发证书。尽管基础技术要求大体相近（均参考CISPR和IEC 61000方法），但测试报告和合格文件须来自EAEU认可实体，方可有效用于EAC标志。产品进入哈萨克斯坦市场前须贴附同时覆盖TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）和TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电）的组合EAC标志。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電磁相容認證（GB/T 9254、GB 17625.1）不滿足EAEU TR CU 020/2011要求。TR CU 020/2011採用與CISPR及IEC 61000系列接軌的GOST標準，但合格評定須在EAEU框架內由EAEU認可實驗室開展，並由經認可的EAEU認證機構頒發證書。儘管基礎技術要求大體相近（均參考CISPR和IEC 61000方法），但測試報告和合格文件須來自EAEU認可實體，方可有效用於EAC標誌。產品進入哈薩克斯坦市場前須貼附同時覆蓋TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）和TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電）的組合EAC標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAC conformity marking under TR CU 020/2011 required for all electrical and electronic equipment placed on the EAEU market (including Kazakhstan)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC EMC certification to GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 required for in-scope IT and AV equipment sold in China

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Decision of the CU Commission No. 879

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TR CU 020/2011 EAC conformity (EMC) is mandatory for all electronic equipment sold in Kazakhstan and other EAEU member states. Chinese CCC EMC documentation does not substitute. EAEU-accredited lab testing and certification body issuance of an EAC certificate is required. Products must display a combined EAC mark covering both the radio (TR EAEU 037/2016) and EMC (TR CU 020/2011) technical regulations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR CU 020/2011 EAC合格标志（电磁兼容）对所有在哈萨克斯坦及其他EAEU成员国销售的电子设备为强制要求。中国CCC电磁兼容文件不可替代。须经EAEU认可实验室测试并由认证机构颁发EAC证书。产品须贴附同时覆盖无线电（TR EAEU 037/2016）和电磁兼容（TR CU 020/2011）技术法规的组合EAC标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR CU 020/2011 EAC合格標誌（電磁相容）對所有在哈薩克斯坦及其他EAEU成員國銷售的電子設備為強制要求。中國CCC電磁相容文件不可替代。須經EAEU認可實驗室測試並由認證機構頒發EAC證書。產品須貼附同時覆蓋無線電（TR EAEU 037/2016）和電磁相容（TR CU 020/2011）技術法規的組合EAC標誌。
